V0422_01_00_00_0.text:
You're facing the strongest Barian of 'em all!
Me! Vector!

V0422_01_00_01_0.text: I'm going to do so many horrible things to you!

V0422_01_00_02_0.text:
Heh heh heh...
If you wanna Duel, who am I to say no!

V0422_01_00_03_0.text: Savor these last few moments of your existence!

V0422_01_00_04_0.text:
I can't wait to crush you!
Because that's the Ray Way!

V0422_01_00_05_0.text:
Aww... You won't call me Ray anymore?
That hurts... Hahaha!

V0422_01_00_06_0.text:
Your powers will be mine!
I can already taste it!

V0422_01_00_07_0.text:
Why are you glaring at me?
What did I ever do to you?

V0422_01_00_08_0.text: I picked this place to be your final resting spot, Nash!

V0422_03_00_00_0.text: How sweet of you to fall so easily for my strategies!

V0422_03_00_01_0.text: The more you're upset, the more it makes me smile!

V0422_03_00_05_0.text:
I've had enough!
It's not wise to make me angry!

V0422_05_00_00_0.text: I have something special in store just for you!

V0422_06_01_03_0.text: That's not even close to adequate!

V0422_07_09_00_0.text: I flip over the card I Set!

V0422_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0422_16_00_00_0.text: This is where you meet your end while I stay perfectly safe.

V0422_21_00_00_0.text: You might have a better chance to win if you attack me.

V0422_21_00_01_0.text: How does it feel to have everything slip away from you?

V0422_21_00_03_0.text: That brings my turn to an end!

V0422_21_00_04_0.text:
Humph...
You won't be smiling for much longer!

V0422_28_00_00_0.text: Hahaha! How I love hearing you scream in frustration!

V0422_28_00_01_0.text: There's nothing I enjoy more than watching you suffer!

V0422_28_00_03_0.text: Your moves are so bad that even I'm embarrassed for you!

V0422_28_00_04_0.text:
Thanks for letting me win, Yuma!
You're such a great friend!

V0422_28_00_05_0.text:
It's your fault that everyone has to suffer, Yuma.
Hahahaha!

V0422_28_00_06_0.text:
Was your strategy to play as badly as possible?
Hahahaha!

V0422_28_00_07_0.text: Are you gonna start pouting about what you should've done?

V0422_28_00_07_1.text:
If you are, I'd love to hear it!
Hahahahaha!

V0422_28_00_09_0.text:
When I first met you, I didn't like you.
And I still don't!

V0422_28_00_10_0.text: It's our destiny to never get along!

V0422_28_00_11_0.text:
Mercy mercy me!
Poor Mizar just got schooled!

V0422_29_00_01_0.text: Maybe I shouldn't have underestimated you...

V0422_29_00_02_0.text:
There's no way I could lose!
There's just no way!

V0422_29_00_03_0.text:
You can't talk to me that way!
You're worth nothing!

V0422_29_00_04_0.text:
Sigh...
You get one point for annoying me.

V0422_29_00_04_1.text: Actually, I'm adding ten thousand points instead of one!

V0422_29_00_05_0.text:
I didn't fail.
This was just another step in my master plan!

V0422_29_00_06_0.text: If you wanna hang out some more, come with me to Endsville!

V0422_29_00_07_0.text: Our worlds need more of you... and less of me...

V0422_29_00_09_1.text: If I'm going down, I'm taking you with me, Nash!

V0422_29_00_10_0.text:
It can’t end like this...
Somebody help me!

V0422_33_00_02_0.text:
No one has my strength!
No one!

V0422_30_00_00_0.text: Time to take care of you the Ray Way!

V0422_30_00_01_0.text: It’s not your place to question a superior officer.

V0422_34_00_00_0.text: I'm not great at Dueling, but I'll give it my best!

V0422_34_00_02_0.text:
Hahahaha!
You're such a joke that I can't stop laughing!

V0422_34_00_03_0.text: Ooooh. This is a dangerous place to Duel.

V0422_34_00_04_0.text: Uh oh. I don't think you made the right move.

V0422_34_00_05_0.text:
Use that monster and end me.
It's what I deserve!

V0422_34_00_06_0.text: I deserve to be consumed by the shadows and forgotten.

V0422_34_00_07_0.text:
Hahahahahaha!
I duped you with my amazing performance!

V0422_34_00_08_0.text: The way I managed to fool you, I should've been an actor!

V0422_34_00_09_0.text: What!? I thought you believed me!

V0422_34_00_10_0.text: This can’t be how it ends for me!

V0422_34_00_11_0.text: Let's have a friendly game of Duel Monsters!

V0422_32_00_00_0.text:
Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links
Will this app welcome my dastardly deeds?

V0422_36_00_00_0.text: I'll just sit back and watch how this Duel unfolds.

V0422_36_00_01_0.text:
Finish this quick.
I have things to do.

V0422_36_00_03_0.text: I know you want me to help you, but I don't feel like it.

V0422_36_00_04_0.text:
This is MY fault?
You're the one without any strategies!

V0422_36_00_05_0.text: I'll give you one last chance.

V0422_36_00_07_0.text:
Let's see what you can do.
Very little, I bet.

V0422_08_00_02_0.text: I activate Rank-Up-Magic - The Seventh One!

V0422_08_00_03_0.text: I'll show you how unstoppable I am!

V0422_08_00_03_1.text: I activate Rank-Up-Magic Admiration of the Thousands!

V0422_08_00_04_0.text: I activate my Quick-Play Spell, Seventh Force!

V0422_08_00_06_0.text:
I activate my Field Spell!
Barian Untopia!

V0422_08_00_08_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Glorious Numbers!

V0422_08_00_09_0.text: I banish Glorious Numbers from my Graveyard!

V0422_08_00_10_0.text: I activate the Field Spell, Sargasso the D.D. Battlefield!

V0422_08_00_10_1.text: This dimensional wasteland will be your final destination!

V0422_08_00_11_0.text: Sargasso the D.D. Battlefield's effect activates!

V0422_08_00_12_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Sargasso Lighthouse!

V0422_08_00_12_1.text: I'm now unaffected by Sargasso's effects!

V0422_08_00_13_0.text: Sargasso Lighthouse activates when it goes to the Graveyard!

V0422_08_00_14_0.text: I could just sit here and beat you, but how fair is that.

V0422_08_00_14_1.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Don Thousand's Throne!

V0422_08_00_15_1.text:
Hahaha!
It's the pick-me-up I need to put you down!

V0422_08_00_16_0.text:
I activate 
Don Thousand's Throne's additional effect!

V0422_08_00_16_1.text: Not only does it stop your attack, it ranks up my monster!

V0422_08_00_17_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Contract with Don Thousand!

V0422_08_00_17_1.text: If you want to Duel me, you have to pay the toll!

V0422_08_00_18_0.text: I activate the Continuous Trap, Vain Betrayer!

V0422_08_00_20_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Corrupted Keys!

V0422_09_00_01_0.text: Masquerade uses 1 Overlay Unit to negate your effect!

V0422_09_00_01_1.text: And as an added bonus, you take damage!

V0422_09_00_02_0.text: If Umbral is Special Summoned, it destroys a Spell or Trap!

V0422_09_00_03_0.text: Umbral uses 1 Chaos Overlay Unit to activate its effect!

V0422_09_00_04_0.text: Manipulator of Souls uses 1 Overlay Unit to play its effect!

V0422_09_00_05_0.text: Regaining LP activates Manipulator of Souls's effect!

V0422_09_00_06_0.text: High Manipulator of Chaos uses 1 Chaos Overlay Unit!

V0422_09_00_07_0.text: Doom Chimera Dragon activates its effect when it battles!

V0422_09_00_08_0.text: Chaos Chimera Dragon uses 1 Chaos Overlay Unit!

V0422_09_00_09_0.text: I pay LP to activate Chaos Chimera Dragon's effect!

V0422_09_00_10_0.text: Master Key Beetle uses 1 Overlay Unit to unleash its effect!

V0422_09_00_11_0.text: Djinn Buster uses its Overlay Units to activate its effect!

V0422_09_00_12_0.text: King Overfiend uses 1 Overlay Unit to activate its effect!

V0422_09_00_13_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Dark Mist's effect!

V0422_09_00_14_0.text: I use 1 Chaos Overlay Unit to activate Dark Storm's effect!

V0422_09_00_16_0.text: Archfiend Seraph uses 1 Overlay Unit to activate its effect!

V0422_09_00_17_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Ragnafinity's effect!

V0422_09_00_19_0.text: I activate Umbral Horror Unform's effect!

V0422_09_00_20_0.text: I activate Umbral Horror Ghoul's effect!

V0422_09_00_21_0.text: I activate Umbral Horror Ghost's effect from my hand!

V0422_09_00_22_0.text: Now I activate Umbral Horror Will o' the Wisp's effect!

V0422_09_00_23_0.text: Will o' the Wisp activates its effect when it's destroyed!

V0422_09_00_24_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Gorgonic Guardian's effect!

V0422_09_00_26_0.text: Gorgonic Gargoyle activates its effect from my hand!

V0422_09_00_27_0.text: Gorgonic Golem activates its effect when it's destroyed!

V0422_09_00_28_0.text: I banish Gorgonic Golem from my Graveyard to use its effect!

V0422_37_00_00_1.text: Force these foolish insects to grovel at your feet!

V0422_37_00_01_0.text:
Chaos Xyz Evolution!
Appear, Number C104!

V0422_37_00_01_1.text: Barian power assaults the light to delight the darkness!

V0422_37_00_02_0.text:
Number 43!
Give rise to their darkest fears!

V0422_37_00_03_0.text:
Chaos Xyz Evolution!
Show yourself, Number C43!

V0422_37_00_04_0.text:
Chaos Xyz Evolution!
Go, Number C5!

V0422_37_00_04_1.text:
Spirits!
Unite your souls to rise into a world of chaos!

V0422_13_00_06_0.text:
Come here!
Number 66: Master Key Beetle!

V0422_37_00_05_0.text:
Number 65!
Rise to judge this cursed world!

V0422_37_00_06_0.text:
Chaos Xyz Evolution!
The executor of infinite hate!

V0422_13_00_09_0.text:
Here's the envoy of the shadows!
Number 96: Dark Mist!

V0422_37_00_07_0.text: What was once Dumon's Chaos Number now belongs to me!

V0422_37_00_08_0.text:
This isn't Marin's monster anymore!
It's mine!

V0422_13_00_16_0.text:
Come on out!
Umbral Horror Will o' the Wisp!

V0422_13_00_22_0.text: I Special Summon a Manipulator Token!

V0422_13_00_23_0.text: I Special Summon an Umbral Horror Mirage Token!

V0422_19_00_16_0.text:
Umbral Horror Will o' the Wisp! 
Attack!

V0422_19_00_23_0.text: I attack with my Umbral Horror Mirage Token!

V0422_26_00_02_0.text: Is that the best you can do?
